extractors.label: Drizzle DB

safetyNotes: topogram extractor list/show/policy do not load package adapter code.
topogram extractor check and topogram extract load package adapter code.
Extractor packages emit review-only candidates; core owns persistence, reconcile, adoption, and canonical topo writes.
Run dry-run adoption before --write.

steps.purpose: Find bundled and first-party package-backed extractors by track.
Read manifest purpose, tracks, install command, policy pin command, and extract command.
Install the extractor package explicitly; Topogram does not install it during extraction.
Allow and pin the extractor manifest version before execution.
Load the adapter and run a minimal smoke extraction against a synthetic fixture.
Read brownfield source and write review-only candidates plus extraction provenance.
Review bundles, extractor provenance, candidate counts, and safety notes.
Choose an explicit adoption selector.
Preview canonical topo writes before changing project-owned records.
Write only reviewed canonical records; extractor packages never own adoption semantics.

extractors.useWhen: Use for Drizzle config, schema modules, table definitions, and migration output.
